about.bio: 李宏伟，海归博士，大厂工程师，与太太和儿子居住在上海，关注其个人周围的环境和人，并以此为主要的创作内容。常用大画幅胶片和中画幅数码拍摄。Li Hongwei is a Shanghai-based photographer. He holds a Ph.D. degree and works as an engineer in a tech company. He lives with his wife and son in Shanghai. His work focuses on the environment and people around him, using large format film and medium format digital cameras.

exhibitions_and_awards.title: How to Leave Gracefully
exhibitions_and_awards.type: Group Exhibition at YSL Gallery, M50
